query: Our React 19 dashboard uses @fluentui/react-components v9. Build a branded light/dark FluentProvider boundary and refactor the hard-coded card colors to semantic tokens.
fabric commandbar migration: we still have office-ui-fabric-react, mergeStyleSets and tests coupled to ms-Button. Plan one safe v9 slice.
The Next.js App Router build flashes unstyled Fluent UI content and logs hydration class mismatches. Check Griffel renderer and server style insertion.
Create an accessible icon-only formatting toolbar from Fluent UI components in TSX, including keyboard and focus tests.
Should our wrapper use useButton_unstable/renderButton_unstable, or can Fluent v9 slots preserve icon, loading, click and className behavior?
Our makeStyles and Tailwind overrides fight in RTL and dark mode. Repair the Fluent token and Griffel ownership without private selectors.
Use Fluent UI in Vue 3 SSR. We installed @fluentui/web-components 3.x, but the article we found uses provideFluentDesignSystem.
Review @fluentui/react-charts for an accessible themed line chart before we commit to Recharts in our Fluent dashboard.
Three @fluentui/react-icons imports fail in our TSX package and the color icon disappears in Windows High Contrast. Separate icon fixes from tsconfig ownership.
The Dialog looks right but Escape, initial focus and focus restore are broken after our custom Fluent slot rendering. Fix the behavior and tests.
Optimize rerenders in a React product card built with CSS Modules. There are no @fluentui packages or Microsoft design requirements.
Design a generic TypeScript polymorphic component API and publish declarations under NodeNext. It is not tied to any UI library.
Create an SPFx Application Customizer, package the .sppkg, configure tenant-wide deployment and request Microsoft Graph permissions.
Implement a FluentValidation AbstractValidator for a .NET request with async database rules and RuleSets.
Use Microsoft's Fluent 2 visual language to prepare a Figma mood board; no code or Fluent UI package is involved.
Our Vue app uses Vuetify. Fix its Pinia store and route guards; do not change the design-system dependency.
Configure Tailwind container queries and CSS cascade layers for a plain HTML marketing page.
Run an accessibility audit of a native HTML checkout form that does not use React or Fluent components.
Upgrade React Testing Library and Vitest mocks in a Chakra UI application. Component behavior is unchanged.
Write a PowerShell function that exports Microsoft 365 audit logs in the Fluent Bit format.
